channel.title: MacOS on SPERIXLABS
channel.description: Recent content in MacOS on SPERIXLABS

item.title: How to Sign macOS PKG Files for Deployment
item.description: Signing a package is a multi-step process. Generate a signing request. Generate Developer ID Installer certificate. Sign the macOS PKG file. Steps to Generate a Signing Request For generating a certificate, first of all you require a Certificate Signing Request (CSR) file. Open “Keychain Access” program within your macOS device. Click on Keychain Access appearing on the top menu bar. Go to Certificate Assistant > Request a Certificate From a Certificate Authority.
